en: I fought with my colleagues the entire time.
Are you kidding with this? So your weekend was a total bust?
No. I got to see Donald Trump waiting for an elevator.
ko: 어, 아니. 엘리베이터를 기다리는 도널드 트럼프를 봤어.

en: Hi. Hey, you're back too. Yeah.
Jenner, can I talk to you outside for just a second? Hey, how was your chef thing?
I guess some people just don't appreciate really good food.
ko: 어떤 사람들은 정말 좋은 음식을 알아보지 못하는 것 같아.

en: Well, maybe it was the kind of food that tasted good at first, but then made everybody vomit and have diarrhea.
Hey, Mr. Bing. That hotel you stayed at called.
Said someone left an eyelash curler in your room.
ko: 누군가 네 방에 속눈썹 컬러를 두고 갔다고 해.

en: Yes, that was mine. Because I figured you hooked up with some girl and she left it there.
Yes, that would have made more sense.
You know, I don't even feel like I know you anymore, man.
ko: 너를 더 이상 잘 아는 것 같지 않아, 친구.
